paragraphs.text: OPPOSING US IN OUR WRITINGS, I SAW JESUS HOLD "THE BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 1 TO 4 AND LIFT UP BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 5 BOOK IN HIS RIGHT AND SAID, WON'T DO, YOU WILL END UP HURTING YOURSELF! NEXT I SAW A VISION OF A PERSON HITTING HIS HEAD ON A GIANT WHITE ROCK WITH THE WORD "ROCK OF OFFENCE" WRITTEN ON THIS WHITE ROCK, RESULTING IN HIS HEAD BECOMING A MASH WITH OOZING BLOOD FLOWING OUT OF HIS/HER ENTIRE MASHED HEAD RESULTING IN INTENSE HEADACHE THAT NO MEDICINE CAN RELIEVE THIS TIGHTNESS OF HIS/HER HEAD EXCEPT THROUGH HUMBLING HIM OR HERSELF BEFORE THE TRINITY GOD AND ASK HIS REPRESENTATIVES TO PRAY FOR FORGIVENESS AND HEALING AND THE TIGHTNESS OF HEAD WILL BE COMPLETELY LIFTED PROVIDED HE/SHE DOES NOT PERMIT DOUBT TO ENTER AGAIN!

I SAW IN A VISION; DOUBT IS A BLACK COBRA WHICH COILED AROUND THE HEAD OF A PERSON AND THIS DOUBT SNAKE HEAD START TO EAT UP THE HEAD/BRAIN OF THIS PERSON RESULTING IN UNABLE TO THINK PROPERLY AND CONSTANT HEADACHE!!!

1 PETER 2:6 WHEREFORE ALSO IT IS CONTAINED IN THE SCRIPTURES, BEHOLD, I LAY IN SION A CHIEF CORNER STONE, ELECT, PRECIOUS: AND HE THAT BELIEVETH ON HIM SHALL NOT BE CONFOUNDED. 1 PETER 2:7 UNTO YOU THEREFORE WHICH BELIEVE HE IS PRECIOUS: BUT UNTO THEM WHICH BE DISOBEDIENT, THE STONE WHICH THE BUILDERS DISALLOWED, THE SAME IS MADE THE HEAD OF THE CORNER, 1 PETER 2:8 AND A STONE OF STUMBLING, AND A ROCK OF OFFENCE, EVEN TO THEM WHICH STUMBLE AT THE WORD, BEING DISOBEDIENT: WHEREUNTO ALSO THEY WERE APPOINTED.
MATHEW 21:44 AND WHOSOEVER SHALL FALL ON THIS STONE SHALL BE BROKEN: BUT ON WHOMSOEVER IT SHALL FALL, IT WILL GRIND HIM TO POWDER.

BE GRACIOUS LIKE THE BEREANS WHO SEARCH THE SCRIPTURES DAY AND NIGHT WITH A FERVENT ATTITUDE OF PRAYER OVER WHAT HE/SHE HAD HEARD OR READ THE WRITING IN THESE BOOKS WRITTEN BY OUR HAND, THE HAND OF GOD (THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH)! OTHERWISE, WE WILL REMOVE OUR GRACE FROM HIS/HER LIFE ACCORDING TO HIS/HER RESPONSE TO US, IN OUR DIVINE HEAVENLY
ORIGIN WRITING IN THESE BEHOLD MY MESSENGER BOOKS SERIES, IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, IN SINGAPORE!
ACTS 17:11 THESE WERE MORE NOBLE THAN THOSE IN THESSALONICA, IN THAT THEY RECEIVED THE WORD WITH ALL READINESS OF MIND, AND SEARCHED THE SCRIPTURES DAILY, WHETHER THOSE THINGS WERE SO.
BE MERCIFUL, THEREBY WE WILL ALSO SHOW YOU MERCY! IF YOU ARE NOT MERCIFUL, WE WILL ALSO NOT SHOW YOU MERCY RESPECTIVELY!
MATHEW 5:7 BLESSED ARE THE MERCIFUL: FOR THEY SHALL OBTAIN MERCY

ISAIAH 59:8 FOR MY THOUGHTS ARE NOT YOUR THOUGHTS, NEITHER ARE YOUR WAYS MY WAYS, SAITH THE LORD. ISAIAH 59:9 FOR AS THE HEAVENS ARE HIGHER THAN THE EARTH, SO ARE MY WAYS HIGHER THAN YOUR WAYS, AND MY THOUGHTS THAN YOUR THOUGHTS. ISAIAH 59:10 FOR AS THE RAIN COMETH DOWN, AND THE SNOW FROM HEAVEN, AND RETURNETH NOT THITHER, BUT WATERETH THE EARTH, AND MAKETH IT BRING FORTH AND BUD, THAT IT MAY GIVE SEED TO THE SOWER, AND BREAD TO THE EATER: ISAIAH 59:11 SO SHALL MY WORD BE THAT GOETH FORTH OUT OF MY MOUTH: IT SHALL NOT RETURN UNTO ME VOID, BUT IT SHALL ACCOMPLISH THAT WHICH I PLEASE, AND IT SHALL PROSPER IN THE THING WHERETO I SENT IT.
